Transaction begins (`BEGIN IMMEDIATE`)\n56\t2. Child 1 is created\n57\t3. Child 2 is created\n58\t4. Dependencies are added\n59\t5. Parent is closed\n60\t6. Transaction commits (`COMMIT`)\n61\t\n62\tIf the process crashes at any point before commit, SQLite automatically rolls back the entire transaction. **Kill -9 during mitosis leaves the workspace in its original state.**\n63\t\n64\t## Migration: One-line change in NEEDLE\n65\t\n66\tReplace the mitosis function in NEEDLE's `bead_store/mod.rs`:\n67\t\n68\t```rust\n69\t// OLD (non-atomic, 5 separate br_create(&child.title, &child.type_, child.priority)?;\n74\t        child_ids.push(id);\n75\t    }\n76\t    for child_id in &child_ids {\n77\t        br_dep_add(child_id, parent_id)?;\n78\t    }\n79\t    br_close(parent_id, \"Split into children\")?;\n80\t    Ok(child_ids)\n81\t}\n82\t\n83\t// NEW (atomic, single bf batch call)\n84\tpub fn mitosis(parent_id: &str, children: Vec<Child>) -> Result<Vec<String>> {\n85\t    let children_json = serde_json::to_string(&children)?;\n86\t    let output = Command::new(\"bf\")\n87\t        .args([\"mitosis\", parent_id, \"--children\", &children_json])\n88\t        .output()?;\n89\t    let results: Vec<BatchResult> = serde_json::from_slice(&output.stdout)?;\n90\t    Ok(results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.id).collect())\n91\t}\n92\t```\n93\t\n94\t## Verification\n95\t\n96\tTest the crash safety:\n97\t\n98\t```bash\n99\t# Setup\n100\tcd /tmp\n101\tmkdir test-mitosis && cd test-mitosis\n102\tbf init\n103\tbf create --title \"parent\" --type task\n104\tPARENT=$(bf list --json | jq -r '.[0].id')\n105\t\n106\t# Run mitosis in background, kill it mid-transaction\n107\tbf mitosis $PARENT --children '[{\"title\":\"child1\"}]' &\n108\tsleep 0.001  # Tiny delay to let transaction start\n109\tkill -9 $!\n110\t\n111\t# Verify: parent should still be open, no child exists\n112\tbf show $PARENT --json | jq '.status'  # Still \"open\"\n113\tbf list --json | jq 'length'           # Still 1 bead (parent only)\n114\t```\n115\t\n116\t## References\n117\t\n118\t- Implementation: NEEDLE Mitosis Migration Guide\n\n## The Problem (NEEDLE's current non-atomic implementation)\n\nNEEDLE's `bead_store/mod.rs` mitosis uses separate `br` CLI calls:\n\n```bash\n# Step 1: Create child 1\nbr create --title \"child 1\" --type task --priority 2\n\n# Step 2: Create child 2\nbr create --title \"child 2\" --type task --priority 2\n\n# Step 3: Add dependency (child 1 blocks parent)\nbr dep add child1 parent\n\n# Step 4: Add dependency (child 2 blocks parent)\nbr dep add child2 parent\n\n# Step 5: Close parent\nbr close parent --reason \"Split into children\"\n```\n\n**Race condition**: If NEEDLE crashes between steps, you get orphaned children or a parent that never closes.\n\n## The Solution (bf batch - all atomic)\n\n### Method 1: Dedicated `bf mitosis` command (recommended)\n\n```bash\nbf mitosis bf-a3f8 \\\n  --children '[\n    {\"title\": \"Implement login handler\", \"type\": \"task\", \"priority\": 2},\n    {\"title\": \"Add session tests\", \"type\": \"task\", \"priority\": 2}\n  ]' \\\n  --reason \"Split into children\"\n```\n\n### Method 2: `bf batch` with JSON\n\n```bash\nbf batch --json '[\n  {\"op\": \"create\", \"title\": \"child 1\", \"type\": \"task\", \"priority\": 2},\n  {\"op\": \"create\", \"title\": \"child 2\", \"type\": \"task\", \"priority\": 2},\n  {\"op\": \"dep_add_blocker\", \"parent\": \"@0\", \"child\": \"bf-a3f8\"},\n  {\"op\": \"dep_add_blocker\", \"parent\": \"@1\", \"child\": \"bf-a3f8\"},\n  {\"op\": \"close\", \"id\": \"bf-a3f8\", \"reason\": \"Split into children\"}\n]'\n```\n\n## Crash Safety Guarantee\n\nAll operations run inside a single SQLite `BEGIN IMMEDIATE` transaction:\n\n1. Transaction begins (`BEGIN IMMEDIATE`)\n2. Child 1 is created\n3. Child 2 is created\n4. Dependencies are added\n5. Parent is closed\n6. Transaction commits (`COMMIT`)\n\nIf the process crashes at any point before commit, SQLite automatically rolls back the entire transaction. **Kill -9 during mitosis leaves the workspace in its original state.**\n\n## Migration: One-line change in NEEDLE\n\nReplace the mitosis function in NEEDLE's `bead_store/mod.rs`:\n\n```rust\n// OLD (non-atomic, 5 separate br calls)\npub fn mitosis(parent_id: &str, children: Vec<Child>) -> Result<Vec<String>> {\n    let mut child_ids = Vec::new();\n    for child in &children {\n        let id = br_create(&child.title, &child.type_, child.priority)?;\n        child_ids.push(id);\n    }\n    for child_id in &child_ids {\n        br_dep_add(child_id, parent_id)?;\n    }\n    br_close(parent_id, \"Split into children\")?;\n    Ok(child_ids)\n}\n\n// NEW (atomic, single bf batch call)\npub fn mitosis(parent_id: &str, children: Vec<Child>) -> Result<Vec<String>> {\n    let children_json = serde_json::to_string(&children)?;\n    let output = Command::new(\"bf\")\n        .args([\"mitosis\", parent_id, \"--children\", &children_json])\n        .output()?;\n    let results: Vec<BatchResult> = serde_json::from_slice(&output.stdout)?;\n    Ok(results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.id).collect())\n}\n```\n\n## Verification\n\nTest the crash safety:\n\n```bash\n# Setup\ncd /tmp\nmkdir test-mitosis && cd test-mitosis\nbf init\nbf create --title \"parent\" --type task\nPARENT=$(bf list --json | jq -r '.[0].id')\n\n# Run mitosis in background, kill it mid-transaction\nbf mitosis $PARENT --children '[{\"title\":\"child1\"}]' &\nsleep 0.001  # Tiny delay to let transaction start\nkill -9 $!\n\n# Verify: parent should still be open, no child exists\nbf show $PARENT --json | jq '.status'  # Still \"open\"\nbf list --json | jq 'length'           # Still 1 bead (parent only)\n```\n\n## References\n\n- Implementation: `src/batch.rs` (mitosis, mitosis_ex, execute_batch)\n- CLI command: `src/cli/mod.rs` (cmd_mitosis, cmd_batch)\n- Tests: `tests/batch_mitosis.rs`\n- Crash safety: `src/storage/sqlite.rs` (with_immediate_transaction)\n","numLines":122,"startLine":1,"totalLines":122}}}

Ordered by:\n27\t/// 1. downstream_impact (more blocking = higher priority)\n28\t/// 2. negative critical_float (lower float = more critical)\n29\t/// 3. negative priority (lower number = higher priority)\n30\t/// 4. negative created timestamp (older = higher priority/FIFO)\n31\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]\n32\tpub struct Score {\n33\t    pub downstream_impact: i64,\n34\t    pub critical_float: i64,\n35\t    pub priority: i32,\n36\t    pub created_at_ts: i64,\n37\t}\n38\t\n39\timpl Score {\n40\t    /// Create a new score from candidate fields.\n41\t    pub fn new(downstream_impact: i64, critical_float: i64, priority: i32, created_at_ts: i64) -> Self {\n42\t        Self { downstream_impact, critical_float, priority, created_at_ts }\n43\t    }\n44\t}\n45\t\n46\timpl PartialOrd for Score {\n47\t    fn partial_cmp(&self, other: &Self) -> Option<std::cmp::Ordering> {\n48\t        Some(self.cmp(other))\n49\t    }\n50\t}\n51\t\n52\timpl Ord for Score {\n53\t    fn cmp(&self, other: &Self) -> std::cmp::Ordering {\n54\t        // downstream_impact: DESC (higher is better)\n55\t        match other.downstream_impact.cmp(&self.downstream_impact) {\n56\t            std::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {}\n57\t            ord => return ord,\n58\t        }\n59\t        // critical_float: ASC (lower is better)\n60\t        match self.critical_float.cmp(&other.critical_float) {\n61\t            std::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {}\n62\t            ord => return ord,\n63\t        }\n64\t        // priority: ASC (lower number is better)\n65\t        match self.priority.cmp(&other.priority) {\n66\t            std::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {}\n67\t            ord => return ord,\n68\t        }\n69\t        // created_at_ts: ASC (older is better/FIFO)\n70\t        self.created_at_ts.cmp(&other.created_at_ts)\n71\t    }\n72\t}\n73\t\n74\t/// A bead with its score for ready/claim operations\n75\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]\n76\tpub struct ScoredBead {\n77\t    pub id: String,\n78\t    pub title: String,\n79\t    pub status: String,\n80\t    pub priority: i32,\n81\t    pub downstream_impact: i64,\n82\t    pub critical_float: f64,\n83\t    pub created_at: String,\n84\t}\n85\t\n86\t/// Atomically claim a bead for a worker.\n87\t///\n88\t/// This function performs the following in a single IMMEDIATE transaction:\n89\t/// 1. Reclaim stale in_progress beads (older than claim_ttl_minutes) back to open\n90\t/// 2. Select candidates with downstream_impact + critical_float scoring\n91\t/// 3. Update the winner to in_progress with assignee=worker\n92\t/// 4. Insert an event\n93\t/// 5. Mark the bead as dirty\n94\t/// 6. Commit\n95\t///\n96\t/// # Arguments\n97\t/// * `tx` - The transaction to use (must be an IMMEDIATE transaction)\n98\t/// * `worker` - The worker ID claiming the bead\n99\t/// * `claim_ttl_minutes` - TTL in minutes after which in_progress beads are reclaimed\n100\t/// * `now` - Current timestamp\n101\t/// * `worker_metadata` - Optional worker metadata (model, harness, version)\n102\t/// * `workspace_path` - Optional workspace path for worker session tracking\n103\t///\n104\t/// # Returns\n105\t/// * `Ok(Some(claim_result))` - A bead was claimed\n106\t/// * `Ok(None)` - No beads available to claim\n107\t/// * `Err(e)` - Transaction error\n108\tpub fn claim(\n109\t    tx: &Connection,\n110\t    worker: &str,\n111\t    claim_ttl_minutes: i64,\n112\t    now: DateTime<Utc>,\n113\t    worker_metadata: Option<&WorkerMetadata>,\n114\t    workspace_path: Option<&str>,\n115\t) -> Result<Option<ClaimResult>> {\n116\t\n117\t    // Step 1: Reclaim stale )?;\n126\t\n127\t    // Step 2: Find candidate beads with impact scoring\n128\t    // Score = downstream_impact + (critical_float / 1000.0)\n129\t    // downstream_impact = count of beads blocked by this one\n130\t    // critical_float = from critical_path_cache (lower is more critical)\n131\t    let mut stmt = tx.prepare(\n132\t        \"SELECT i.id,\n133\t                COALESCE(COUNT(d.issue_id), 0) as downstream_impact,\n134\t                COALESCE(c.float, 999999) as critical_float,\n135\t                i.priority\n136\t         FROM issues i\n137\t         LEFT JOIN dependencies d ON d.depends_on_id = i.id AND d.type IN ('blocks', 'parent-child', 'conditional-blocks', 'waits-for')\n138\t         LEFT JOIN critical_path_cache c ON c.bead_id = i.id\n139\t         WHERE i.status = 'open'\n140\t           AND i.ephemeral = 0\n141\t           AND i.pinned = 0\n142\t           AND i.is_template = 0\n143\t           AND i.deleted_at IS NULL\n144\t         GROUP BY i.id\n145\t         ORDER BY\n146\t             downstream_impact DESC,\n147\t             critical_float ASC,\n148\t             i.priority ASC,\n149\t             i.created_at ASC\n150\t         LIMIT 1\",\n151\t    )?;\n152\t\n153\t    let mut rows = stmt.query([])?;\n154\t\n155\t    if let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n156\t        let bead_id: String = row.get(0)?;\n157\t\n158\t        // Step 3: Update the winner to in_progress with a race condition check\n159\t        // The WHERE status = 'open' condition ensures we only claim if still open\n160\t        let rows_affected = tx.execute(\n161\t            \"UPDATE issues\n162\t             SET status = 'in_progress', assignee = ?, updated_at = ?\n163\t             WHERE id = ? AND status = 'open'\",\n164\t            params![worker, now.to_rfc3339(), &bead_id],\n165\t        )?;\n166\t\n167\t        // If no rows were affected, another worker claimed this bead first\n168\t        if rows_affected == 0 {\n169\t            return Ok(None);\n170\t        }\n171\t\n172\t        // Step 4: Record worker session if metadata provided\n173\t        if let Some(meta) = worker_metadata {\n174\t            tx.execute(\n175\t                \"INSERT INTO worker_sessions (worker_id, model, harness, harness_version, bead_id, workspace_path)\n176\t                 VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)\",\n177\t                params![\n178\t                    &meta.worker_id,\n179\t                    meta.model.as_deref(),\n180\t worker_metadata.and_then(|m| serde_json::to_string(m).ok());\n190\t        tx.execute(\n191\t            \"INSERT INTO events (issue_id, event_type, actor, new_value, comment, created_at)\n192\t             VALUES (?, 'claimed', ?, ?, ?, ?)\",\n193\t            params![&bead_id, worker, worker, metadata_json, now.to_rfc3339()],\n194\t        )?;\n195\t\n196\t        // Step 6: Mark as dirty\n197\t        tx.execute(\n198\t            \"INSERT OR REPLACE INTO dirty_issues (issue_id, marked_at)\n199\t             VALUES (?, ?)\",\n200\t            params![&bead_id, now.to_rfc3339()],\n201\t        )?;\n202\t\n203\t        Ok(Some(ClaimResult {\n204\t            bead_id,\n205\t            reclaimed,\n206\t            workspace_path: None,\n207\t        }))\n208\t    } else {\n209\t claiming,\n216\t/// ordered by the same scoring formula:\n217\t/// - downstream_impact DESC (more blocking = higher priority)\n218\t/// - critical_float ASC (lower float = more critical)\n219\t/// - candidates to return\n225\t///\n226\t/// # Returns\n227\t/// * `Ok(Vec<ScoredBead>)` - List of scored bead candidates\n228\tpub fn get_ready_candidates(tx: &Connection, limit: usize) -> Result<Vec<ScoredBead>> {\n229\t    let mut stmt = tx.prepare(\n230\t        \"SELECT i.id, i.title, i.status, i.priority,\n231\t                COALESCE(COUNT(d.issue_id), 0) as downstream_impact,\n232\t                COALESCE(c.float, 999999) as critical_float,\n233\t                i.created_at\n234\t         FROM issues i\n235\t         LEFT JOIN dependencies d ON 'open'\n238\t           AND i.ephemeral = 0\n239\t           AND i.pinned = 0\n240\t           AND i.is_template = 0\n241\t           AND i.deleted_at IS NULL\n242\t         GROUP BY i.id\n243\t         ORDER BY\n244\t             downstream_impact DESC,\n245\t             critical_float ASC,\n246\t             i.priority ASC,\n247\t             i.created_at ASC\n248\t         LIMIT ?1\",\n249\t    )?;\n250\t\n251\t    let mut rows = stmt.query(params![limit as i64])?;\n252\t    let mut candidates = Vec::new();\n253\t\n254\t    while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n255\t        candidates.push(ScoredBead {\n256\t            id: row.get(0)?,\n257\t            title: row.get(1)?,\n258\t            status: row.get(2)?,\n259\t            priority: row.get(3)?,\n260\t Ok(candidates)\n267\t}\n268\t\n269\t/// Claim from the highest-priority bead across multiple workspaces.\n270\t///\n271\t/// Scores each workspace's top candidate, picks the global winner,\n272\t/// and claims from that workspace.\n273\t///\n274\t/// # Arguments\n275\t/// * `workspace_paths` - Slice of workspace directory paths\n276\t/// * `worker` - The worker ID claiming the bead\n277\t/// * `claim_ttl_minutes` - TTL in minutes after which in_progress beads are reclaimed\n278\t/// * `worker_metadata` - Optional worker metadata (model, harness, version)\n279\t///\n280\t/// # Returns\n281\t/// * `Ok(Some(claim_result))` - A bead was claimed (with workspace_path set)\n282\t/// * `Ok(None)` - No beads available to claim in any workspace\n283\t/// * `Err(e)` - Transaction error\n284\tpub fn claim_any(\n285\t    workspace_paths: &[PathBuf],\n286\t    worker: &str,\n287\t    claim_ttl_minutes: i64,\n288\t    worker_metadata: Option<&WorkerMetadata>,\n289\t) -> Result<Option<ClaimResult>> {\n290\t    use crate::config::load_metadata;\n291\t    use crate::storage::Storage;\n292\t\n293\t    // Score across all workspaces\n294\t    let mut best: Option<(Score, usize)> = None;\n295\t    for (idx, workspace_path) in workspace_paths.iter().enumerate() {\n296\t        let beads_dir = get_beads_dir(workspace_path)?;\n297\t        let metadata = load_metadata(&beads_dir)?;\n298\t        let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n299\t\n300\t        // Open each workspace's SQLite\n301\t        match Storage::open(&db_path) {\n302\t            Ok(storage) => {\n303\t                if let Some(score) = storage.top_candidate_score()? {\n304\t                    if best.as_ref().map(|(b, _)| score > *b).unwrap_or(true) {\n305\t                        best = Some((score, idx));\n306\t                    }\n307\t                }\n308\t            }\n309\t            Err(_) => {\n310\t                // Skip workspaces that can't be opened (e.g., no .beads directory)\n311\t                continue;\n312\t            }\n313\t        }\n314\t    }\n315\t\n316\t    match best {\n317\t        None => Ok(None),\n318\t        Some((_, workspace_idx)) => {\n319\t            let workspace_path = &workspace_paths[workspace_idx];\n320\t            let beads_dir = get_beads_dir(workspace_path)?;\n321\t            let metadata = load_metadata(&beads_dir)?;\n322\t            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n323\t            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n324\t\n325\t            let now = Utc::now();\n326\t            match storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n327\t                claim(tx, worker, claim_ttl_minutes, now, worker_metadata, Some(workspace_path.to_str().unwrap_or(\"\")))\n328\t            })? {\n329\t                Some(mut result) => {\n330\t                    result.workspace_path = Some(workspace_path.clone());\n331\t                    Ok(Some(result))\n332\t                }\n333\t                None => Ok(None),\n334\t            }\n335\t        }\n336\t    }\n337\t}\n338\t\n339\t/// Get the .beads directory from a workspace path.\n340\t///\n341\t/// If the workspace path itself contains a .beads directory, use it.\n342\t/// Otherwise, assume the path IS the .beads directory.\n343\tfn get_beads_dir(workspace_path: &Path) -> Result<std::path::PathBuf> {\n344\t    let beads_dir = workspace_path.join(\".beads\");\n345\t    if beads_dir.is_dir() {\n346\t        Ok(beads_dir)\n347\t    } else if workspace_path.ends_with(\".beads\") {\n348\t        Ok(workspace_path.to_path_buf())\n349\t    } else {\n350\t        use anyhow::bail;\n351\t        bail!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace_path)\n352\t    }\n353\t}\n354\t\n355\t/// Find all bead workspace directories starting from a search path.\n356\t///\n357\t/// Searches for directories containing a .beads subdirectory.\n358\t/// Searches upward from the start path through parent directories.\n359\tpub fn find_workspaces(start_path: &Path) -> Result<Vec<PathBuf>> {\n360\t\n361\t    let mut workspaces = Vec::new();\n362\t\n363\t    // Start from the given path and search upward\n364\t    let mut current = start_path.to_path_buf();\n365\t    loop {\n366\t        let beads_dir = current.join(\".beads\");\n367\t        if beads_dir.is_dir() {\n368\t            // Found a workspace - add the parent directory\n369\t            workspaces.push(current.clone());\n370\t        }\n371\t\n372\t        // Move to parent directory\n373\t        if !current.pop() {\n374\t            // Reached the root, stop searching\n375\t            break;\n376\t        }\n377\t    }\n378\t\n379\t    Ok(workspaces)\n380\t}\n381\t\n382\t#[cfg(test)]\n383\tmod tests {\n384\t    use super::*;\n385\t    use crate::storage::Storage;\n386\t    use }\n429\t\n430\t    #[test]\n431\t    fn test_claim_reclaims_stale() {\n432\t        let (_temp, mut storage) = setup_test_db();\n433\t\n434\t        // Create an in_progress bead with old }\n458\t}\n459\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"11951734-0c82-4f04-8dda-a530c712546f","uuid":"115e11eb-1809-4770-a0af-63d9d35ac734","timestamp":"2026-05-01T13:16:54.974Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/bead-forge/src/claim.rs","content":"use anyhow::Result;\nuse chrono::{DateTime, Duration, Utc};\nuse rusqlite::{params, Connection};\nuse serde::Serialize;\nuse std::path::{Path, PathBuf};\n\n/// Worker metadata for tracking which model/harness claimed a bead\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]\npub struct WorkerMetadata {\n    pub worker_id: String,\n    pub model: Option<String>,\n    pub harness: Option<String>,\n    pub harness_version: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Result of a claim operation\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ClaimResult {\n    pub bead_id: String,\n    pub reclaimed: usize,\n    pub workspace_path: Option<PathBuf>,\n}\n\n/// Score for cross-workspace candidate comparison.\n///\n/// Higher scores are better. Ordered by:\n/// 1. downstream_impact (more blocking = higher priority)\n/// 2. negative critical_float (lower float = more critical)\n/// 3. negative priority (lower number = higher priority)\n/// 4. negative created timestamp (older = higher priority/FIFO)\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]\npub struct Score {\n    pub downstream_impact: i64,\n    pub critical_float: i64,\n    pub priority: i32,\n    pub created_at_ts: i64,\n}\n\nimpl Score {\n    /// Create a new score from candidate fields.\n    pub fn new(downstream_impact: i64, critical_float: i64, priority: i32, created_at_ts: i64) -> Self {\n        Self { downstream_impact, critical_float, priority, created_at_ts }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl PartialOrd for Score {\n    fn partial_cmp(&self, other: &Self) -> Option<std::cmp::Ordering> {\n        Some(self.cmp(other))\n    }\n}\n\nimpl Ord for Score {\n    fn cmp(&self, other: &Self) -> std::cmp::Ordering {\n        // downstream_impact: DESC (higher is better)\n        match other.downstream_impact.cmp(&self.downstream_impact) {\n            std::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {}\n            ord => return ord,\n        }\n        // critical_float: ASC (lower is better)\n        match self.critical_float.cmp(&other.critical_float) {\n            std::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {}\n            ord => return ord,\n        }\n        // priority: ASC (lower number is better)\n        match self.priority.cmp(&other.priority) {\n            std::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {}\n            ord => return ord,\n        }\n        // created_at_ts: ASC (older is better/FIFO)\n        self.created_at_ts.cmp(&other.created_at_ts)\n    }\n}\n\n/// A bead with its score for ready/claim operations\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize)]\npub struct ScoredBead {\n    pub id: String,\n    pub title: String,\n    pub status: String,\n    pub priority: i32,\n    pub downstream_impact: i64,\n    pub critical_float: f64,\n    pub created_at: String,\n}\n\n/// Atomically claim a bead for a worker.\n///\n/// This function performs the following in a single IMMEDIATE transaction:\n/// 1. Reclaim stale in_progress beads (older than claim_ttl_minutes) back to open\n/// 2. Select candidates with downstream_impact + critical_float scoring\n/// 3. Update the winner to in_progress with assignee=worker\n/// 4. Insert an event\n/// 5. Mark the bead as dirty\n/// 6. Commit\n///\n/// # Arguments\n/// * `tx` - The transaction to use (must be an IMMEDIATE transaction)\n/// * `worker` - The worker ID claiming the bead\n/// * `claim_ttl_minutes` - TTL in minutes after which in_progress beads are reclaimed\n/// * `now` - Current timestamp\n/// * `worker_metadata` - Optional worker metadata (model, harness, version)\n/// * `workspace_path` - Optional workspace path for worker session tracking\n///\n/// # Returns\n/// * `Ok(Some(claim_result))` - A bead was claimed\n/// * `Ok(None)` - No beads available to claim\n/// * `Err(e)` - Transaction error\npub fn claim(\n    tx: &Connection,\n    worker: &str,\n    claim_ttl_minutes: i64,\n    now: DateTime<Utc>,\n    worker_metadata: Option<&WorkerMetadata>,\n    workspace_path: Option<&str>,\n) -> Result<Option<ClaimResult>> {\n\n    // Step 1: Reclaim stale in_progress beads\n    let stale_cutoff = now - Duration::minutes(claim_ttl_minutes);\n    let reclaimed = tx.execute(\n        \"UPDATE issues\n         SET status = 'open', assignee = NULL, updated_at = ?\n         WHERE status = 'in_progress'\n           AND updated_at < ?\",\n        params![now.to_rfc3339(), stale_cutoff.to_rfc3339()],\n    )?;\n\n    // Step 2: Find candidate beads with impact scoring\n    // Score = downstream_impact + (critical_float / 1000.0)\n    // downstream_impact = count of beads blocked by this one\n    // critical_float = from critical_path_cache (lower is more critical)\n    let mut stmt = tx.prepare(\n        \"SELECT i.id,\n                COALESCE(COUNT(d.issue_id), 0) as downstream_impact,\n                COALESCE(c.float, 999999) as critical_float,\n                i.priority\n         FROM issues i\n         LEFT JOIN dependencies d ON d.depends_on_id = i.id AND d.type IN ('blocks', 'parent-child', 'conditional-blocks', 'waits-for')\n         LEFT JOIN critical_path_cache c ON c.bead_id = i.id\n         WHERE i.status = 'open'\n           AND i.ephemeral = 0\n           AND i.pinned = 0\n           AND i.is_template = 0\n           AND i.deleted_at IS NULL\n         GROUP BY i.id\n         ORDER BY\n             downstream_impact DESC,\n             critical_float ASC,\n             i.priority ASC,\n             i.created_at ASC\n         LIMIT 1\",\n    )?;\n\n    let mut rows = stmt.query([])?;\n\n    if let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n        let bead_id: String = row.get(0)?;\n\n        // Step 3: Update the winner to in_progress with a race condition check\n        // The WHERE status = 'open' condition ensures we only claim if still open\n        let rows_affected = tx.execute(\n            \"UPDATE issues\n             SET status = 'in_progress', assignee = ?, updated_at = ?\n             WHERE id = ? AND status = 'open'\",\n            params![worker, now.to_rfc3339(), &bead_id],\n        )?;\n\n        // If no rows were affected, another worker claimed this bead first\n        if rows_affected == 0 {\n            return Ok(None);\n        }\n\n        // Step 4: Record worker session if metadata provided\n        if let Some(meta) = worker_metadata {\n            tx.execute(\n                \"INSERT INTO worker_sessions (worker_id, model, harness, harness_version, bead_id, workspace_path)\n                 VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6)\",\n                params![\n                    &meta.worker_id,\n                    meta.model.as_deref(),\n                    meta.harness.as_deref(),\n                    meta.harness_version.as_deref(),\n                    &bead_id,\n                    \"\", // workspace_path not available in transaction context\n                ],\n            )?;\n        }\n\n        // Step 5: Insert event with worker metadata in comment field\n        let metadata_json = worker_metadata.and_then(|m| serde_json::to_string(m).ok());\n        tx.execute(\n            \"INSERT INTO events (issue_id, event_type, actor, new_value, comment, created_at)\n             VALUES (?, 'claimed', ?, ?, ?, ?)\",\n            params![&bead_id, worker, worker, metadata_json, now.to_rfc3339()],\n        )?;\n\n        // Step 6: Mark as dirty\n        tx.execute(\n            \"INSERT OR REPLACE INTO dirty_issues (issue_id, marked_at)\n             VALUES (?, ?)\",\n            params![&bead_id, now.to_rfc3339()],\n        )?;\n\n        Ok(Some(ClaimResult {\n            bead_id,\n            reclaimed,\n            workspace_path: None,\n        }))\n    } else {\n        Ok(None)\n    }\n}\n\n/// Get ready candidates using the same scoring logic as claim().\n///\n/// This returns a list of beads that would be considered for claiming,\n/// ordered by the same scoring formula:\n/// - downstream_impact DESC (more blocking = higher priority)\n/// - critical_float ASC (lower float = more critical)\n/// - priority ASC (0=Critical, 4=Backlog)\n/// - created_at ASC (FIFO tiebreaker)\n///\n/// # Arguments\n/// * `tx` - The transaction to use\n/// * `limit` - Maximum number of candidates to return\n///\n/// # Returns\n/// * `Ok(Vec<ScoredBead>)` - List of scored bead candidates\npub fn get_ready_candidates(tx: &Connection, limit: usize) -> Result<Vec<ScoredBead>> {\n    let mut stmt = tx.prepare(\n        \"SELECT i.id, i.title, i.status, i.priority,\n                COALESCE(COUNT(d.issue_id), 0) as downstream_impact,\n                COALESCE(c.float, 999999) as critical_float,\n                i.created_at\n         FROM issues i\n         LEFT JOIN dependencies d ON d.depends_on_id = i.id AND d.type IN ('blocks', 'parent-child', 'conditional-blocks', 'waits-for')\n         LEFT JOIN critical_path_cache c ON c.bead_id = i.id\n         WHERE i.status = 'open'\n           AND i.ephemeral = 0\n           AND i.pinned = 0\n           AND i.is_template = 0\n           AND i.deleted_at IS NULL\n         GROUP BY i.id\n         ORDER BY\n             downstream_impact DESC,\n             critical_float ASC,\n             i.priority ASC,\n             i.created_at ASC\n         LIMIT ?1\",\n    )?;\n\n    let mut rows = stmt.query(params![limit as i64])?;\n    let mut candidates = Vec::new();\n\n    while let Some(row) = rows.next()? {\n        candidates.push(ScoredBead {\n            id: row.get(0)?,\n            title: row.get(1)?,\n            status: row.get(2)?,\n            priority: row.get(3)?,\n            downstream_impact: row.get(4)?,\n            critical_float: row.get(5)?,\n            created_at: row.get(6)?,\n        });\n    }\n\n    Ok(candidates)\n}\n\n/// Claim from the highest-priority bead across multiple workspaces.\n///\n/// Scores each workspace's top candidate, picks the global winner,\n/// and claims from that workspace.\n///\n/// # Arguments\n/// * `workspace_paths` - Slice of workspace directory paths\n/// * `worker` - The worker ID claiming the bead\n/// * `claim_ttl_minutes` - TTL in minutes after which in_progress beads are reclaimed\n/// * `worker_metadata` - Optional worker metadata (model, harness, version)\n///\n/// # Returns\n/// * `Ok(Some(claim_result))` - A bead was claimed (with workspace_path set)\n/// * `Ok(None)` - No beads available to claim in any workspace\n/// * `Err(e)` - Transaction error\npub fn claim_any(\n    workspace_paths: &[PathBuf],\n    worker: &str,\n    claim_ttl_minutes: i64,\n    worker_metadata: Option<&WorkerMetadata>,\n) -> Result<Option<ClaimResult>> {\n    use crate::config::load_metadata;\n    use crate::storage::Storage;\n\n    // Score across all workspaces\n    let mut best: Option<(Score, usize)> = None;\n    for (idx, workspace_path) in workspace_paths.iter().enumerate() {\n        let beads_dir = get_beads_dir(workspace_path)?;\n        let metadata = load_metadata(&beads_dir)?;\n        let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n\n        // Open each workspace's SQLite\n        match Storage::open(&db_path) {\n            Ok(storage) => {\n                if let Some(score) = storage.top_candidate_score()? {\n                    if best.as_ref().map(|(b, _)| score > *b).unwrap_or(true) {\n                        best = Some((score, idx));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                // Skip workspaces that can't be opened (e.g., no .beads directory)\n                continue;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    match best {\n        None => Ok(None),\n        Some((_, workspace_idx)) => {\n            let workspace_path = &workspace_paths[workspace_idx];\n            let beads_dir = get_beads_dir(workspace_path)?;\n            let metadata = load_metadata(&beads_dir)?;\n            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n\n            let now = Utc::now();\n            match storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n                claim(tx, worker, claim_ttl_minutes, now, worker_metadata, Some(workspace_path.to_str().unwrap_or(\"\")))\n            })? {\n                Some(mut result) => {\n                    result.workspace_path = Some(workspace_path.clone());\n                    Ok(Some(result))\n                }\n                None => Ok(None),\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Get the .beads directory from a workspace path.\n///\n/// If the workspace path itself contains a .beads directory, use it.\n/// Otherwise, assume the path IS the .beads directory.\nfn get_beads_dir(workspace_path: &Path) -> Result<std::path::PathBuf> {\n    let beads_dir = workspace_path.join(\".beads\");\n    if beads_dir.is_dir() {\n        Ok(beads_dir)\n    } else if workspace_path.ends_with(\".beads\") {\n        Ok(workspace_path.to_path_buf())\n    } else {\n        use anyhow::bail;\n        bail!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace_path)\n    }\n}\n\n/// Find all bead workspace directories starting from a search path.\n///\n/// Searches for directories containing a .beads subdirectory.\n/// Searches upward from the start path through parent directories.\npub fn find_workspaces(start_path: &Path) -> Result<Vec<PathBuf>> {\n\n    let mut workspaces = Vec::new();\n\n    // Start from the given path and search upward\n    let mut current = start_path.to_path_buf();\n    loop {\n        let beads_dir = current.join(\".beads\");\n        if beads_dir.is_dir() {\n            // Found a workspace - add the parent directory\n            workspaces.push(current.clone());\n        }\n\n        // Move to parent directory\n        if !current.pop() {\n            // Reached the root, stop searching\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(workspaces)\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::storage::Storage;\n    use crate::model::{Issue, Status};\n\n    fn setup_test_db() -> (tempfile::NamedTempFile, Storage) {\n        let temp_file = tempfile::NamedTempFile::new().unwrap();\n        let storage = Storage::open(temp_file.path()).unwrap();\n        (temp_file, storage)\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_claim_basic() {\n        let (_temp, mut storage) = setup_test_db();\n\n        // Create an open bead\n        let issue = Issue::new(\"bf-test1\".to_string(), \"Test bead\".to_string(), \".\".to_string());\n        storage.create_issue(&issue).unwrap();\n\n        // Claim it\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, \"worker1\", 30, Utc::now(), None, None)\n        }).unwrap();\n\n        assert!(result.is_some());\n        let claim_result = result.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(claim_result.bead_id, \"bf-test1\");\n        assert_eq!(claim_result.reclaimed, 0);\n\n        // Verify the bead is now in_progress\n        let updated = storage.get_issue(\"bf-test1\").unwrap().unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(updated.status, Status::InProgress);\n        assert_eq!(updated.assignee.as_ref().unwrap(), \"worker1\");\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_claim_no_candidates() {\n        let (_temp, mut storage) = setup_test_db();\n\n        // No beads available\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, \"worker1\", 30, Utc::now(), None, None)\n        }).unwrap();\n\n        assert!(result.is_none());\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_claim_reclaims_stale() {\n        let (_temp, mut storage) = setup_test_db();\n\n        // Create an in_progress bead with old updated_at\n        let mut issue = Issue::new(\"bf-stale\".to_string(), \"Stale bead\".to_string(), \".\".to_string());\n        issue.status = Status::InProgress;\n        issue.assignee = Some(\"worker_old\".to_string());\n        issue.updated_at = Utc::now() - Duration::minutes(60);\n        storage.create_issue(&issue).unwrap();\n\n        // Create an open bead\n        let issue2 = Issue::new(\"bf-open\".to_string(), \"Open bead\".to_string(), \".\".to_string());\n        storage.create_issue(&issue2).unwrap();\n\n        // Claim with 30 min TTL - should reclaim the stale one\n        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n            claim(tx, \"worker_new\", 30, Utc::now(), None, None)\n        }).unwrap();\n\n        assert!(result.is_some());\n        let claim_result = result.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(claim_result.reclaimed, 1);\n\n        // The open bead should be claimed (not the stale one, since it was reclaimed to open)\n        // After reclaim, the stale bead is open again, so it could be claimed too\n        // But the open bead has priority by created_at order\n    }\n}\n","numLines":459,"startLine":1,"totalLines":459}}}

cli.workspace.unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(\".\"));\n581\t\n582\t    // For init command, we allow the .beads directory to not exist yet\n583\t    match &cli.command {\n584\t        Commands::Init { .. } => {\n585\t            let beads_dir = workspace.join(\".beads\");\n586\t            return match cli.command {\n587\t                Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n588\t                _ => unreachable!(),\n589\t            };\n590\t        }\n591\t        _ => {}\n592\t    }\n593\t\n594\t    let beads_dir = find_beads_dir(&workspace)\n595\t        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"No .beads directory found in {:?}\", workspace))?;\n596\t\n597\t    match cli.command {\n598\t        Commands::Init { prefix } => cmd_init(&beads_dir, &prefix),\n599\t        Commands::Create { title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label } => {\n600\t            cmd_create(&beads_dir, title, type_, priority, description, assignee, label)\n601\t        }\n602\t        Commands::List { status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, format, json } => {\n603\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n604\t            cmd_list(&beads_dir, status, type_, assignee, priority, limit, &format)\n605\t        }\n606\t        Commands::Show { id, format, json } => {\n607\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n608\t            cmd_show(&beads_dir, &id, &format)\n609\t        }\n610\t        Commands::Update { id, title, status, priority, assignee } => {\n611\t            cmd_update(&beads_dir, &id, title, status, priority, assignee)\n612\t        }\n613\t        Commands::Close { id, reason } => cmd_close(&beads_dir, &id, &reason),\n614\t        Commands::Reopen { id } => cmd_reopen(&beads_dir, &id),\n615\t        Commands::Delete { id } => cmd_delete(&beads_dir, &id),\n616\t        Commands::Ready { limit, format, json } => {\n617\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n618\t            cmd_ready(&beads_dir, limit, &format)\n619\t        }\n620\t        Commands::Claim { assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, workspace_paths, dry_run, format, json } => {\n621\t            let format = if json { \"json\".to_string() } else { format };\n622\t            cmd_claim(&beads_dir, &assignee, model, harness, harness_version, any, fallback, &workspace_paths, dry_run, &format)\n623\t        }\n624\t        Commands::Sync { flush_only, import_only } => cmd_sync(&beads_dir, flush_only, import_only),\n625\t        Commands::Doctor { repair } => cmd_doctor(&beads_dir, repair),\n626\t        Commands::Count { status } => cmd_count(&beads_dir, status),\n627\t        Commands::Batch { file, json, stdin } => cmd_batch(&beads_dir, file, json, stdin),\n628\t        Commands::Mitosis { id, children, reason, format } => cmd_mitosis(&beads_dir, &id, &children, &reason, &format),\n629\t        Commands::Dep(dep) => cmd_dep(&beads_dir, dep),\n630\t        Commands::Label(label) => cmd_label(&beads_dir, label),\n631\t        Commands::Comments(comments) => cmd_comments(&beads_dir, comments),\n632\t        Commands::Search { query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, format } => {\n633\t            cmd_search(&beads_dir, query, status, type_, assignee, label, priority_min, priority_max, limit, &format)\n634\t        }\n635\t        Commands::Stats { by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, format } => {\n636\t            cmd_stats(&beads_dir, by_type, by_priority, by_assignee, by_label, &format)\n637\t        }\n638\t        Commands::Schema { target, format } => cmd_schema(&target, &format),\n639\t        Commands::Config(config) => cmd_config(&beads_dir, config),\n640\t        Commands::Velocity { model, harness, format } => cmd_velocity(&beads_dir, model, harness, &format),\n641\t        Commands::Labels { id, format } => cmd_labels(&beads_dir, &id, &format),\n642\t        Commands::Annotate(annotate) => cmd_annotate(&beads_dir, annotate),\n643\t        Commands::Log { id, limit, format } => cmd_log(&beads_dir, &id, limit, &format),\n644\t        Commands::CriticalPath { id, max_depth, format } => cmd_critical_path(&beads_dir, &id, max_depth, &format),\n645\t        Commands::Rotate { days, dry_run } => cmd_rotate(&beads_dir, days, dry_run),\n646\t    }\n647\t}\n648\t\n649\tfn cmd_init(beads_dir: &PathBuf, prefix: &str) -> Result<()> {\n650\t    std::fs::create_dir_all(beads_dir)?;\n651\t\n652\t    let config_path = beads_dir.join(\"config.yaml\");\n653\t    if !config_path.exists() {\n654\t        let config = format!(\n655\t            r#\"issue_prefixes: [{}]\n656\tdefault_priority: 2\n657\tdefault_type: task\n658\tclaim_ttl_minutes: 30\n659\t\"#,\n660\t            prefix\n661\t        );\n662\t        std::fs::write(&config_path, config)?;\n663\t    }\n664\t\n665\t    let metadata_path = beads_dir.join(\"metadata.json\");\n666\t    if !metadata_path.exists() {\n667\t        let metadata = r#\"{\"database\": \"beads.db\", \"jsonl_export\": \"issues.jsonl\"}\"#;\n668\t        std::fs::write(&metadata_path, metadata)?;\n669\t    }\n670\t\n671\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(\"beads.db\");\n672\t    let _storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n673\t\n674\t    let gitignore_path = beads_dir.join(\".gitignore\");\n675\t    if !gitignore_path.exists() {\n676\t        std::fs::write(&gitignore_path, \"beads.db\\nbeads.db-shm\\nbeads.db-wal\\n\")?;\n677\t    }\n678\t\n679\t    println!(\"Initialized bead-forge workspace in {:?}\", beads_dir);\n680\t    Ok(())\n681\t}\n682\t\n683\tfn   labels: Vec<String>,\n691\t) -> Result<()> {\n692\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n693\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n694\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n695\t    let mut storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n696\t\n697\t    let count = storage.count_issues()?;\n698\t    let prefix = get_default_prefix(&config);\n699\t    let id = crate::id::generate_id(prefix, count);\n700\t\n701\t    let mut issue = Issue::new(id.clone(), title, \".\".to_string());\n702\t    issue.issue_type = IssueType::from_str(type_.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?;\n703\t    issue.priority = Priority(priority);\n704\t    issue.description = description;\n705\t    issue.assignee = assignee;\n706\t    issue.labels = labels;\n707\t\n708\t    storage.create_issue(&issue)?;\n709\t\n710\t    println!(\"{}\", id);\n711\t    Ok(())\n712\t}\n713\t\n714\tfn cmd_list(\n715\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n716\t    status: Option<String>,\n717\t    type_: Option<String>,\n718\t    assignee: Option<String>,\n719\t    priority: Option<i32>,\n720\t    limit: Option<usize>,\n721\t    format: &str,\n722\t) -> Result<()> {\n723\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n724\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n725\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n726\t\n727\t    let mut filter = IssueFilter::default();\n728\t    if let Some(s) = status {\n729\t        filter.status = Some(Status::from_str(s.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n730\t    }\n731\t    if let Some(t) = type_ {\n732\t        filter.issue_type = Some(IssueType::from_str(t.as_str()).map_err(|e| anyhow::anyhow!(e))?);\n733\t    }\n734\t    filter.assignee = assignee;\n735\t    filter.priority = priority;\n736\t    // --limit 0 means unlimited\n737\t    filter.limit = limit.and_then(|l| if l == 0 { None } else { Some(l) });\n738\t\n739\t    let issues = storage.list_issues(&filter)?;\n740\t\n741\t    match format {\n742\t        \"json\" => {\n743\t            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&issues)?);\n744\t        }\n745\t        _ => {\n746\t            for issue in issues {\n747\t                println!(\"[{}] {} - {} ({})\", issue.id, issue.title, issue.status, issue.priority);\n748\t            }\n749\t        }\n750\t    }\n751\t\n752\t    Ok(())\n753\t}\n754\t\n755\tfn cmd_show(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n756\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n757\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n758\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n759\t\n760\t    let issue = storage.get_issue(id)?.ok_or_else(|| anyhow!(\"Bead not found: {}\", id))?;\n761\t\n762\t    match format {\n763\t        \"json\" => {\n764\t            // Strip dependencies/comments before serializing: NEEDLE's BrDependency\n765\t            // format ({id, title, status, priority, dependency_type}) differs from\n766\t            // bead-forge's Dependency format ({issue_id, depends_on_id, type, ...}).\n767\t            // NEEDLE has #[serde(default)] on the deps field so empty is fine.\n768\t            let mut out = issue;\n769\t            out.dependencies = vec![];\n770\t            out.comments = vec![];\n771\t            // Wrap in array so NEEDLE's parse_single_bead (Vec<Bead> → first) works.\n772\t            println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&vec![out])?);\n773\t        }\n774\t        _ => {\n775\t            println!(\"ID: {}\", issue.id);\n776\t            println!(\"Title: {}\", issue.title);\n777\t            println!(\"Status: {}\", issue.status);\n778\t            println!(\"Priority: {}\", issue.priority);\n779\t            println!(\"Type: {}\", issue.issue_type);\n780\t            if let Some(desc) = &issue.description {\n781\t                println!(\"Description: {}\", desc);\n782\t            }\n783\t            if let Some(assignee) = &issue.assignee {\n784\t                println!(\"Assignee: {}\", assignee);\n785\t            }\n786\t            if !issue.labels.is_empty() {\n787\t                println!(\"Labels: {}\", issue.labels.join(\", \"));\n788\t            }\n789\t        }\n790\t    }\n791\t\n792\t    Ok(())\n793\t}\n794\t\n795\tfn cmd_update(\n796\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n797\t storage.update_issue(id, &changes)?;\n816\t    println!(\"Updated bead {}\", id);\n817\t    Ok(())\n818\t}\n819\t\n820\tfn cmd_close(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, reason: &str) -> Result<()> {\n821\t Ok(())\n843\t}\n844\t\n845\tfn cmd_delete(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str) -> Result<()> {\n846\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n847\t    let db_path = &str) -> Result<()> {\n860\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n861\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n862\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n863\t\n864\t    let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n865\t        get_ready_candidates(tx, limit)\n866\t    })?;\n867\t\n868\t    match format {\n869\t        \"json\" => {\n870\t            for candidate in candidates {\n871\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string(&candidate)?);\n872\t            }\n873\t        }\n874\t        _ => {\n875\t            for candidate in candidates {\n876\t                println!(\"[{}] {} (priority={}, impact={})\",\n877\t                    candidate.id, candidate.title, candidate.priority,\n878\t                    candidate.downstream_impact);\n879\t            }\n880\t        }\n881\t    }\n882\t\n883\t    Ok(())\n884\t}\n885\t\n886\tfn cmd_claim(\n887\t    beads_dir: &PathBuf,\n888\t    assignee: &str,\n889\t    model: Option<String>,\n890\t    harness: Option<String>,\n891\t    harness_version: Option<String>,\n892\t    any: bool,\n893\t    fallback: bool,\n894\t    workspace_paths: &[PathBuf],\n895\t    dry_run: bool,\n896\t    format: &str,\n897\t) -> Result<()> {\n898\t    let config = load_config(beads_dir)?;\n899\t    let claim_ttl = config.claim_ttl_minutes;\n900\t\n901\t    // Build worker metadata\n902\t    let worker_metadata = WorkerMetadata {\n903\t        worker_id: assignee.to_string(),\n904\t        model: model.clone(),\n905\t        harness: harness.clone(),\n906\t        harness_version: harness_version.clone(),\n907\t    };\n908\t\n909\t    if dry_run {\n910\t        // Dry run mode - show what would be claimed\n911\t        let candidates: Vec<(PathBuf, crate::claim::ScoredBead)> = if any || fallback {\n912\t            // Multi-workspace dry run\n913\t            let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n914\t                // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n915\t                find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n916\t            } else {\n917\t                workspace_paths.to_vec()\n918\t            };\n919\t\n920\t            let mut all_candidates = Vec::new();\n921\t            for path in &paths {\n922\t                let local_beads_dir = path.join(\".beads\");\n923\t                if local_beads_dir.exists() {\n924\t                    let local_metadata = match load_metadata(&local_beads_dir) {\n925\t                        Ok(m) => m,\n926\t                        Err(_) => continue,\n927\t                    };\n928\t                    let local_db_path = local_beads_dir.join(&local_metadata.database);\n929\t                    if let Ok(local_storage) = Storage::open(&local_db_path) {\n930\t                        if let Ok(local_candidates) = local_storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n931\t                            get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n932\t                        }) {\n933\t                            for c in local_candidates {\n934\t                                all_candidates.push((path.clone(), c));\n935\t                            }\n936\t                        }\n937\t                    }\n938\t                }\n939\t            }\n940\t\n941\t            // Sort by score and take top 1\n942\t            all_candidates.sort_by(|a, b| {\n943\t                let score_a = (b.1.downstream_impact, b.1.priority, b.1.created_at.clone());\n944\t                let score_b = (a.1.downstream_impact, a.1.priority, a.1.created_at.clone());\n945\t                score_a.cmp(&score_b)\n946\t            });\n947\t            all_candidates.into_iter().take(1).collect()\n948\t        } else {\n949\t            // Single workspace dry run\n950\t            let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n951\t            let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n952\t            let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n953\t            let candidates = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n954\t                get_ready_candidates(tx, 1)\n955\t            })?;\n956\t            candidates.into_iter().map(|c| (beads_dir.parent().unwrap_or(beads_dir).to_path_buf(), c)).collect()\n957\t        };\n958\t\n959\t        if let Some((path, candidate)) = candidates.first() {\n960\t            match format {\n961\t                \"json\" => {\n962\t                    let output = serde_json::json!({\n963\t                        \"bead_id\": candidate.id,\n964\t                        \"title\": candidate.title,\n965\t                        \"priority\": candidate.priority,\n966\t                        \"downstream_impact\": candidate.downstream_impact,\n967\t                        \"assignee\": assignee,\n968\t                        \"workspace\": path.display().to_string(),\n969\t                        \"dry_run\": true\n970\t                    });\n971\t                    println!(\"{}\", output);\n972\t                }\n973\t                _ => {\n974\t                    println!(\"{} (priority={}, impact={}, workspace={})\",\n975\t                        candidate.id, candidate.priority, candidate.downstream_impact, path.display());\n976\t                }\n977\t            }\n978\t        } else if format == \"json\" {\n979\t            println!(\"{{}}\");\n980\t        } else {\n981\t            println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n982\t        }\n983\t    } else if any {\n984\t        // Claim from any workspace\n985\t        let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n986\t            // Auto-discover workspaces from current directory\n987\t            find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n988\t        } else {\n989\t            workspace_paths.to_vec()\n990\t        };\n991\t\n992\t        let result = claim_any(&paths, assignee, claim_ttl, Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n993\t\n994\t        match result {\n995\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n996\t                match format {\n997\t                    \"json\" => {\n998\t                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n999\t                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n1000\t                            \"reclaimed\": reclaimed,\n1001\t                            \"assignee\": assignee,\n1002\t                            \"workspace\": workspace_path.map(|p| p.display().to_string())\n1003\t                        });\n1004\t                        println!(\"{}\", output);\n1005\t                    }\n1006\t                    _ => {\n1007\t                        if let Some(path) = workspace_path {\n1008\t                            println!(\"{} (workspace: {})\", bead_id, path.display());\n1009\t                        } else {\n1010\t                            println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1011\t                        }\n1012\t                    }\n1013\t                }\n1014\t            }\n1015\t            None => {\n1016\t                if format == \"json\" {\n1017\t                    println!(\"{{}}\");\n1018\t                } else {\n1019\t                    println!(\"No beads available to claim\");\n1020\t                }\n1021\t            }\n1022\t        }\n1023\t    } else if fallback {\n1024\t        // Fallback mode: try current workspace first, then any\n1025\t        let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1026\t        let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1027\t        let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1028\t\n1029\t        let result = storage.with_immediate_transaction(|tx| {\n1030\t            claim(tx, assignee, claim_ttl, Utc::now(), Some(&worker_metadata), None)\n1031\t        })?;\n1032\t\n1033\t        match result {\n1034\t            Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, .. }) => {\n1035\t                match format {\n1036\t                    \"json\" => {\n1037\t                        let output = serde_json::json!({\n1038\t                            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n1039\t                            \"reclaimed\":                 _ => {\n1045\t                        println!(\"{}\", bead_id);\n1046\t                    }\n1047\t                }\n1048\t            }\n1049\t            None => {\n1050\t                // Fallback to any workspace\n1051\t                let paths = if workspace_paths.is_empty() {\n1052\t                    find_workspaces(&std::env::current_dir()?)?\n1053\t                } Some(&worker_metadata))?;\n1058\t\n1059\t                match result {\n1060\t                    Some(ClaimResult { bead_id, reclaimed, workspace_path }) => {\n1061\t                        match \"workspace\": workspace_path.map(|p| p.display().to_string())\n1068\t                                });\n1069\t                                println!(\"{}\", output);\n1070\t                            }\n1071\t                            _ => {\n1072\t                                if let Some(path) = workspace_path {\n1073\t                                    println!(\"{} (workspace: {})\", }\n1125\t\n1126\t    Ok(())\n1127\t}\n1128\t\n1129\tfn cmd_sync(beads_dir: &PathBuf, flush_only: bool, import_only: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1130\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1131\t false)?;\n1143\t        println!(\"Synced {} beads to JSONL\", count);\n1144\t    }\n1145\t\n1146\t    Ok(())\n1147\t}\n1148\t\n1149\tfn cmd_doctor(beads_dir: &PathBuf, repair: bool) -> Result<()> Ok(())\n1166\t}\n1167\t\n1168\tfn cmd_count(beads_dir: &PathBuf, status: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n1169\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1170\t    let db_path = json: Option<String>, stdin: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1188\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1189\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1190\t    let storage = {\n1195\t        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&file_path)?;\n1196\t        serde_json::from_str(&content)?\n1197\t    } else if stdin {\n1198\t        parse_stdin()?\n1199\t    } else {\n1200\t        return Err(anyhow!(\"Must provide --file, --json, or --stdin\"));\n1201\t    };\n1202\t\n1203\t    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n1204\t\n1205\t    // Print results\n1206\t    for result in results {\n1207\t        if result.status == \"ok\" {\n1208\t            if let Some(id) = result.id {\n1209\t                println!(\"[op {}] ok: {}\", result.op, id);\n1210\t            } else {\n1211\t                println!(\"[op {}] ok\", result.op);\n1212\t            }\n1213\t        } else {\n1214\t            eprintln!(\"[op {}] error: {}\", result.op, result.error.unwrap_or_default());\n1215\t        }\n1216\t    }\n1217\t\n1218\t    Ok(())\n1219\t}\n1220\t\n1221\tfn cmd_mitosis(beads_dir: &PathBuf, id: &str, children: &str, reason: &str, format: &str) -> Result<()> {\n1222\t    let metadata = load_metadata(beads_dir)?;\n1223\t    let db_path = beads_dir.join(&metadata.database);\n1224\t    let storage = Storage::open(&db_path)?;\n1225\t\n1226\t    // Parse children as JSON array of {title, type, priority} or {title, type, priority, description, assignee, labels}\n1227\t    let children_defs: Vec<MitosisChild> = serde_json::from_str(children)?;\n1228\t\n1229\t    // Build the batch operations\n1230\t    let ops = mitosis_ex(id, children_defs, Some(reason.to_string()))?;\n1231\t\n1232\t    // Execute atomically\n1233\t    let results = execute_batch(&storage, ops, beads_dir)?;\n1234\t\n1235\t    match format {\n1236\t        \"json\" => {\n1237\t            println!(\"{}\",
